B. 2025 MCAHPS Format Tables 
26 
sa_deemd_cpmt: Generic Level for Copay Computation 
SAS Format: $GENLEVF 
N: N/A

SAS Format: $ID_F 
N: NO 
U: UNKNOWN 
Y: YES

N: NO 
U: UNKNOWN 
Y: YES

SAS Format: $FPL 
1: BELOW 100% FPL 
2: 100% OR ABOVE FPL 
9: UNKNOWN

U: UNKNOWN

sa_lis: Low Income
